sourceTitle.description: Title of the shared document or collection.

sourcePath.description: Path of the shared document or collection.

documentId.description: Identifier of the shared document, if any.

collectionId.description: Identifier of the shared collection, if any.

urlId.description: Short URL identifier for the share, if set.

url.description: URL of the publicly shared document.

domain.description: Custom domain the share is served on, if any.

title.description: Override title displayed on the publicly shared page. If not set the source document or collection title is used.

iconUrl.description: URL of an icon displayed on the publicly shared page, overriding the workspace branding.

published.description: If true the share can be loaded without a user account.

includeChildDocuments.description: If to also give permission to view documents nested beneath this one.

allowSubscriptions.description: Whether visitors to the public share can subscribe to receive email notifications when the document is updated. Requires SMTP to be configured on the workspace.

allowIndexing.description: Whether the shared page may be indexed by search engines.

showLastUpdated.description: Whether to show the last-updated time on the shared page.

showTOC.description: Whether to show a table of contents on the shared page.

views.description: The number of times the shared page has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Date and time when this share was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time when this share was edited

lastAccessedAt.description: Date and time when this share was last viewed. Only returned to workspace admins.
